home.headline: One company. One breakdown. One growth loop you can steal.
home.description: Every week I break down a growing company. What works, what doesn't, and what you can copy.
home.articlesDesc: Company breakdowns with strategies you can copy today.
home.split1Title: Everything is on their website. They just can't see it.
home.split1Text: Every analysis starts from what anyone can see. Website, pricing, reviews, job posts. Then finds the growth engine underneath.
home.split2Text: Each breakdown ends with a growth loop. A specific, repeatable play you can adapt to your product, your market, your budget.
home.ctaTitle: The next breakdown, in your inbox
home.ctaText: One email a week. One company breakdown. Zero spam.

newsletter.title: All editions
newsletter.subtitle: Each edition analyzes a company in depth and proposes a growth plan based on public data. What's working, where the opportunities are, and where to start.
newsletter.ctaTitle: The next breakdown, in your inbox
newsletter.ctaText: Every Monday, a new breakdown in your inbox.

whatIDo.card1Title: I look through the eyes of someone who just found them
whatIDo.card1Text: Website, pricing, reviews. What's already there and nobody stops to look at.
whatIDo.card2Text: What works, what doesn't, and what can be done with what they already have.
whatIDo.card3Text: Each breakdown ends with a concrete plan. Something you can adapt to your product and your budget.

about.title: Diego Guzmán Toledo
about.tagline: I build and analyze growing businesses.
about.bio1: I grew up in Costa Rica surrounded by businesses where they know you by name. Small shops, shoe stores and restaurants where you can see the effort in everything they do. One day, one of the most well-known florists in the country closed. Not because of bad service, but because the next generation never knew it existed. That brought me to Madrid: to learn how to make good businesses reach the people who don't know them yet.
about.bio2: I have 5+ years in digital marketing. I managed multi-million budgets at Publicis, coordinated omnichannel launches across three countries at Accenture, and today I apply all of that to startups and SMBs where every euro counts.
about.bio3: Today I'm CMO at Mentorhood and I co-lead growth at Good People, a boutique B2B agency in Madrid. My job is to make better marketing decisions using data, not intuition. Every change should be justified by what your customer does, not by what someone thinks.
about.bio4: If you have a business with something good to offer and want to grow it, we do it here

footer.tagline: Marketing you can apply to your business.
footer.cta: Want the next analysis in your inbox?
